title: HKMC
description: A datapack that adds various Hollow Knight features to Minecraft!
body:
![All the items from the HKMC datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f486942b1b049c527c032d5f51f21c448a6b11d.png)

- ### HKMC Adds various features from the hit indie game [Hollow Knight](https://www.hollowknight.com) into Minecraft!
- ### ⚠ Click on a spoiler to see more details!
- ### Full HKMC playlist (with shorts) on YOUTUBE: [Click here](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLzDjP7QcTzjJDNRM7gkLdDyXOGZMq234v&si=oD6R9LbkOaP2xk2g)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YCpJntEmysY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Charms
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lo5Smn2L8aA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Commands
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![All commands from HKMC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5bd4d542ea8cd133a0a30ee4f8675a82e842301.png)

</details>

## How to Craft Items

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Recipes for all items are provided to all players immediately. Use the recipe book to find and craft items. Alternatively you can use the `/loot give @s loot hk:<item name>` command to give yourself any item.

</details>

## Nails and Pale Ore
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Nails are the primary weapons of HKMC. You can attack with them to gain soul.

Craft the Old Nail with the following recipe: ![Old Nail recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c31834d811036b1335b89a1e3ae9c2e31a0e6745.png)

To upgrade that nail, drop it on top of an anvil with Pale Ore.
Craft the Pale Ore with the following recipe: ![Pale Ore recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c99ade5a85f82888f9ecef6652cfe9b8fc99b32.png)

Amount of Pale Ore needed to upgrade the nail increases with more powerful variants of the nail:
1. Old Nail + 1 Pale Ore = Sharpened Nail
2. Sharpened Nail + 1 Pale Ore = Channelled Nail
3. Channelled Nail + 2 Pale Ore = Coiled Nail
4. Coiled Nail + 3 Pale Ore = Pale Nail

![Nail items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/805e1e2ecd585232077d1898ef630e54b287e51a.png)

</details>

## Dream Nail
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Allows you to teleport to anywhere with the dreamgate and attack to gain more SOUL.

Hold right-click while looking up or down to warp or make a dreamgate.

![Item description for Dream Nail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9db471fb97e6cf2a12c50ce5cff9e7e4345bc5f.png)

1. Looking up: teleport to a dreamgate. fails if none are present.
2. Looking down: create a dreamgate. sends a message in chat which shows you the location of the newly created dreamgate.

</details>

## Abilities and Spells

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

All abilities and spells have to be crafted and put in your inventory to unlock their powers and gain the ability to use them.

![Abilities and Spells Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddaaf28f9372166221ac590807321c527a4d5ad7.png)

0. Focus: Hold the ability wheel and hold sneak while looking DOWN to charge, then release to heal 2 masks. Available to use by default, no unlock needed.
1. Isma's Tear: Protects the player from molten liquids
2. Monarch Wings: Press jump key twice to double-jump
3. Mothwing/Shade Cloak: Press forward key twice to dash. Mothwing cloak deals 2 hearts of damage for every dash.
4. Crystal Heart: Hold the ability wheel and hold sneak WITHOUT looking down to charge. Then release to super dash.
5. Mantis Claw: face a wall, look slightly down and hold the jump key to climb up the wall (similar to ladders)

6. Vengeful Spirit/Shade Soul: right-click with the ability wheel WITHOUT looking up or down to cast a spirit that will damage enemies and go through walls.
7. Desolate Dive/Descending Dark: right-click with the ability wheel while looking DOWN and FALLING to dive downwards with insane speed.
8. Howling Wraiths/Abyss Shriek: right-click with the ability wheel while looking UP to damage enemies directly above you.

</details>

## Nail Arts

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

All nail arts have to be crafted and put in your inventory to unlock their powers and gain the ability to use them.

![All nail arts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85a41e13985e966bc6a6ecfbd0b4c5d4c41ce726.png)

TO USE NAIL ARTS: Hold any nail, hold sneak, and release according to the following requirements:

1. Great Slash: release while NOT looking up or down.
2. Cyclone Slash: release WHILE looking up or down.
   
For Dash Slash: *keep holding sneak* while also pressing forward key twice at the same time.

</details>

## Other Collectibles

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Also have to be crafted. The following list specifies all collectibles with custom functionality:

![All Collectibles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75e070168acd52ea1cbf60886076433d5600ef86.png)

1. Delicate Flower: while it's in your inventory, if you take damage, it will turn into the ruined flower. Only one flower breaks per instance of damage taken.
2. Map and Quill: right-click to see your last death location in coordinates.
3. Lumafly Lantern: hold in your mainhand to use dynamic lighting.
4. Mask Shard: craft and obtain 4 to create 1 full mask. 1 mask adds 2 hearts to your health. Max masks that can be obtained are 4.
5. Vessel Fragment: craft and obtain 3 to create 1 full vessel. 1 vessel adds 33 SOUL to your maximum SOUL. Max soul vessels that can be obtained are 3.

</details>
